title: Luffy Looks for Enel
description: Enel sets the Ark Maxim and his storm clouds against Skypiea while Luffy, Nami, and the others realize the island itself is in danger.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 12, 13, this scene focuses on Luffy, Enel, Nami, Aisa, Wyper. Enel sets the Ark Maxim and his storm clouds against Skypiea while Luffy, Nami, and the others realize the island itself is in danger.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's a trident with high electrical heat!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Damn it! If I space out,

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: If I can just catch him somehow...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Stop coming up with stupid ideas!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: It seems you quite dislike my mantra.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: That is natural. It is, after all,

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: What gives me such overwhelming dominance!

summary: Enel sets the Ark Maxim and his storm clouds against Skypiea while Luffy, Nami, and the others realize the island itself is in danger.
